assessmentList.title: Assessment History
assessmentList.subtitle: View your Mini-CEX, DOPS, and CBD evaluation results.
assessmentList.ackDesc: Click the button to confirm you have received these results.
assessmentList.deleteConfirm: The {template} assessment for {name} will be deleted. Assessments already acknowledged by the student cannot be deleted.

assessmentCreate.errorRequired: Please complete the assignment, template, and assessment date.
assessmentCreate.title: Clinical Assessment Form
assessmentCreate.subtitle: Select a student and assessment instrument to begin the evaluation.
assessmentCreate.fillIndicators: Enter a score for each measured indicator.
assessmentCreate.feedbackDesc: Provide qualitative feedback and improvement suggestions for the student.

assessmentGrades.title: Rotation Grade Summary
assessmentGrades.subtitle: Calculate, approve, and publish final clinical rotation grades for students.
assessmentGrades.calcPlaceholder: Select a student & rotation to calculate the grade...

assessmentAppeals.title: Grade Appeals
assessmentAppeals.subtitle: Grade objections from students. An accepted appeal reopens the grade (approved status) for correction and re-publishing.

assessmentMyGrades.title: Clinical Transcript (Internal)
assessmentMyGrades.subtitle: Below are the details of your final rotation grades published by the study program. These grades will be forwarded to SIAKAD as your official KHS grades.
assessmentMyGrades.emptyDesc: You have no published final rotation grades yet.
assessmentMyGrades.appealDesc: An appeal may only be submitted once per grade and within the window set by the program after the grade is published. Explain the basis of your objection as concretely as possible (uncounted components, assessment dates, etc.).
assessmentMyGrades.appealPlaceholder: Example: The DOPS assessment on June 20 by Dr. X is not yet included in the calculation...

assessmentRubrics.fetchError: Failed to load rubric template data
assessmentRubrics.weightError: Total percentage weight must be 100%. Currently: {total}%
assessmentRubrics.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this template?
assessmentRubrics.title: Rubric Builder
assessmentRubrics.subtitle: Manage the format and weighting of assessments for OSCE, Mini-CEX, etc.
assessmentRubrics.cardDesc: Adjust the indicators, maximum scores, and their percentage weights.
